channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Petal Runner gets a demo ahead of a planned release later this year
item.content:encoded:
Nano Park Studios has released a brand new demo for its upcoming RPG Petal Runners, where players are couriers delivering pets around Sapphire Valley. Players take on the role of Cali the courier who is accompanied on her adventure with Kira, a first generation HanaPet. Delivering pets is not the only thing to do in Petal Runners with side quests and minigames to experience too.

The Petal Runner demo lets players experience the second district of the game, where minigames can be played, a quest to heal a family’s relationship, and meet different HanaPets. There are some known bugs that in the demo that Nano Park Studios is working on, and they are listed below.

  • [CRASH] Attempting to complete Percy’s “The Boy” quest while mounted on the bike crashes the game, while talking to the 3rd interview NPC of the overworld portion (“Suspiciously Innocent Bystander”)
  • The HanaPets Fan Club quest has persistence issues across game saves/loads.
  • In the “Join the Crew” minigame, it’s possible to get stuck to the walls
  • Losing the last LCI minigame on a single heart can still trigger the success condition
  • (RARE) In the “Table Tennis” minigame, the ball can clip through the player, causing an unfair loss
  • (RARE) Under some circumstances, dismounting the bike can cause the player to perpetually clip through the top-right of the world, and eventually the universe.

  • General

    • Valerie’s instructional message doesn’t show up in the “Messages“ section of the Leash.
    • There is no way to pause the game during the Sewer escape minigame, or during LCI calibrations.

  • Audio/Visual

    • In the “Wind the Clock” minigame, the control hints can return even when the hour hand is already in the zone.
    • Percy will detach from the player during his quest when the Bike Valet terminal is interacted with.
      • Percy will be duplicated if the player mounts and dismounts the bike following this.
    • Riding escalators with Kira causes him to temporarily detach.
    • Opening the Leash in certain moments such as the 739 Emerald Road delivery can cause issues relating to the BGM.

  • Display/Scaling

  • ALT-TABing from full-screen mode can cause inconsistent surface sizing that don’t resolve until the game is re-started.
    • Rapidly re-sizing the game between fullscreen & windowed can also produce a similar result
  • Potential scaling issue in fullscreen mode on monitors that aren’t 16:9.

Petal Runner is due to release later this year on PC via Steam.

Source: Steam



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/03/06/petal-runner-gets-a-demo-ahead-of-a-planned-release-later-this-year/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Echoes of Aincrad is a new RPG set in the Sword Art Online universe
item.content:encoded:
Bandai Namco lifted the lid of its new RPG Echoes of Aincrad, which is set in the Sword Art Online universe but appears to be its own thing. Aincrad is the world in which players will step into to explore its corners, fight dangerous monsters, and save Aincrad from falling. Players will be able to create their own characters and pick a partner that will be a companion on the journey.

Echoes of Aincrad will have different cities to explore filled with their own quests to tackle. Players will need to upgrade their skills, equipment, and companion to take on the more difficult challenges and bosses. Three different versions of Echoes of Aincrad have been made available for pre-order, and they are as follows.

  • Standard Edition – base game with a pre-order bonus of the proto-elucidator weapon pack.
  • Digital Deluxe Edition – Standard Edition content, death game mode early unlock, expansion DLC, and a starter pack that includes 50,000 Col, 10x Healing Potions, 10x Mystic Crystal, and 10x High SP Potion
  • Digital Ultimate Edition – All Deluxe Edition items plus digital artbook, digital soundtrack, special anime, and armour pack.

Echoes of Aincrad will launch on July 10th for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series XS.

Source: Echoes of Aincrad | Official Website (EN)



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/03/06/echoes-of-aincrad-is-a-new-rpg-set-in-the-sword-art-online-universe/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
